localStorage.globalAppData_example-multi-run-milling_: {"investigationTitle":"Tool Wear Dataset","investigationDescription":"This investigation concerns the progressive wear of milling tools during machining operations, with the objective of understanding, modeling, and predicting tool degradation under varying cutting conditions. Controlled milling experiments were conducted in which spindle speed, feed rate, and depth of cut were systematically varied, while tool condition was monitored through measured wear indicators—most notably flank wear (VB). The resulting dataset captures the relationship between machining parameters and tool wear evolution, supporting studies in tool condition monitoring, degradation analysis, and prognostics for manufacturing systems.","license":"https://www.usa.gov/government-works","publicReleaseDate":"2022-11-22"}

selectedTestSetup.name: Milling Lab
selectedTestSetup.description: The experimental setup consists of a CNC milling machine equipped with a single cutting tool, where controlled milling operations are performed on workpiece material under predefined machining conditions. The setup allows systematic variation of spindle speed, feed rate, and depth of cut while the same milling tool is used over successive runs, leading to progressive tool wear. Tool condition is periodically assessed through direct measurements of flank wear (VB), and the resulting measurements are recorded alongside the corresponding machining parameters, forming the basis for tool wear analysis.

parameters.name: Sensor Location
parameters.description: Placement of measurement sensors on the milling machine to capture signals such as vibration or cutting forces.

parameters.name: Sensor Frequency Range
parameters.description: Frequency range over which the sensor reliably captures machining signals.

parameters.name: Filter Type
parameters.description: Type of signal filtering applied to the sensor output to remove unwanted frequency components.

parameters.name: HP cutoff frequency
parameters.description: Cutoff frequency for a high-pass filter applied to the sensor signal to remove low-frequency noise.

parameters.name: Preamplifier
parameters.description: Device used to boost sensor signals before main amplification, reducing signal loss and noise.

parameters.name: Amplifier
parameters.description: Device that further amplifies the preamplified sensor signal for recording or processing.

parameters.name: Amplifier max load
parameters.description: Maximum signal amplitude the amplifier can handle without distortion.

parameters.name: Amplifier min load
parameters.description: Minimum detectable signal amplitude for accurate measurement.

parameters.name: Amplifier sensitivity
parameters.description: Amplifier gain, defining how input signals are scaled to output voltage.

parameters.name: Amplifier output
parameters.description: Voltage output from the amplifier that feeds the data acquisition system.

parameters.name: Current converter
parameters.description: Device that converts machine current into a measurable voltage or digital signal.

parameters.name: Power supply
parameters.description: Electrical source providing voltage and current to sensors, amplifiers, and acquisition hardware.

parameters.name: Power supply output
parameters.description: Nominal voltage and current delivered by the power supply to instrumentation.

parameters.name: Current type
parameters.description: Type of current being measured in the experiment, such as AC or DC from the milling machine motor.

parameters.name: Filter type
parameters.description: Type of signal filter applied to the measurement data, such as low-pass, high-pass, or band-pass, to remove unwanted frequency components.

parameters.name: Filter roll-off rate
parameters.description: Rate at which the filter attenuates frequencies beyond the cutoff, describing the steepness of the filter slope.

parameters.name: Filter LP cutoff frequency
parameters.description: Cutoff frequency for a low-pass filter applied to the signal to remove high-frequency noise.

parameters.name: Filter HP cutoff frequency
parameters.description: Cutoff frequency for a high-pass filter applied to the signal to remove low-frequency noise.

parameters.name: Smoothening method
parameters.description: Algorithm or approach used to smooth the sensor signal, reducing high-frequency fluctuations.

parameters.name: Smoothening time constant
parameters.description: Characteristic time over which the smoothing algorithm averages or filters the signal.

parameters.name: Smoothening sampling frequency
parameters.description: Frequency at which the smoothed signal is sampled or updated during acquisition or processing.
